meta_description: Marti Vilas' personal portfolio: projects, experience, education, and CV.
introduction_text: Web developer focused on clean interfaces, useful products, and code that is not a pain to maintain.
availability_text: Available for web projects, hiring, and collaborations.
synopsis_title: I build digital products with judgment, detail, and solid craft.
synopsis_text: I am Marti Vilas, a developer focused on creating clear, fast, and polished web experiences. I like working close to the problem: understanding what the user needs, turning it into an interface, and leaving behind a maintainable technical base.
portfolio_summary: This portfolio brings together projects, professional experience, education, and a short version of my CV so you can quickly understand how I work.

projects.title: Portfolio Dashboard
projects.description: Responsive interface for presenting metrics, case studies, and key links with quick readability.

projects.title: Task Manager
projects.description: Application for organizing tasks, prioritizing deliveries, and keeping a clean workflow.

projects.title: Commercial Landing Page
projects.description: Conversion-focused page with value sections, social proof, and clear calls to action.

cv_summary: Web Developer Trainee and Web Application Development (DAW) student based in Barcelona. Frontend development with React.js and TypeScript on real-world projects, with experience applying SCRUM and Agile methodologies.
cv_highlights: Frontend with React.js, TypeScript, Vue.js (Quasar), and Astro.
State management with Zustand and backend with Node.js + TypeScript.
Responsive layout and adaptive web application development.
SCRUM/Agile methodologies: sprints, dailies, and code review.
contact_title: Let's talk about your next project
contact_summary: Tell me what you have in mind and I will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_message_placeholder: Briefly tell me what you need
contact_consent_label: I agree that my data may be used to respond to this inquiry.

learning_by_doing_title: Where I have learned by doing

experiences.description: Frontend development with React.js and TypeScript on real-world projects. Global state management with Zustand and backend with Node.js + TypeScript. Landing page deployment on WordPress and SCRUM/Agile methodologies. Adoption of generative AI as a complement to my workflow, applied with judgment and personal validation.
Customer service, query handling, and stock management within the section.
Packaging, garment distribution, and warehouse organization.
Extracurricular basketball coach for students aged 9 to 11.

studies.title: Higher VET in Web Application Development (DAW)
studies.description: Official program covering frontend and backend development, databases, deployment, and agile methodologies. The core of my current technical profile.
